creator: sprice@hiwaay.net
text:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
Date: Sun, 4 Apr 1999 04:39:26 +0200 (MET DST)
From: Juergen Lock <nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de>
To: freebsd-ports@FreeBSD.ORG
Subject: Re: ports/10939: update audio/dap to 2.0.2 (please test...)

In article <199904040155.DAA13167@saturn.kn-bremen.de> you write:
>
>>Number:         10939
>>Category:       ports
>>Synopsis:       update audio/dap to 2.0.2 (please test...)

Ooops, i forgot one file:

--- /dev/null	Sun Apr  4 04:05:49 1999
+++ patches/patch-ad	Sun Apr  4 04:27:48 1999
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+Index: spkit/spkit/Makefile.linux
+@@ -65,6 +65,7 @@
+ libdsp.a: $(OBJS)
+ 	rm -f $(LIBNAME)
+ 	ar ruv $(LIBNAME) $(OBJS)
++	ranlib $(LIBNAME)
+ 
+ clean:
+ 	rm -f $(OBJS)

 Sorry,
-- 
Juergen Lock <nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de>
